title: ceropegia divaricata
intro: Ceropegia divaricata, also known as the rosy ceropegia or rosy climbing milkweed, is a flowering plant native to India. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceropegia divaricata include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-arthritic agent. The herbal preparations of Ceropegia divaricata include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves and roots, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
